General.Name: Wanda Hotel Development Co Ltd
General.Description: Wanda Hotel Development Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property development, investment, leasing, and management activities in the People's Republic of China, the United States, the British Virgin Islands, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Hotel Operation and Management Services; Hotel Design and Construction Management Services; Investment Properties Leasing; and Trading and Leasing of Overseas' Properties. It is also involved in developing, operating, managing, leasing, and franchising hotels; and the provision of hotel design and construction management services, such as interior and mechanical, electrical, plumbing design, related consultancy, and project management services, as well as engages in other ancillary and catering business. It operates hotels under the Wanda Reign, Wanda Vista, Wanda Realm, Wanda Jin, Wanda Yi, Wanda Moments, Wanda Yue, and Wanda Encore brand names. The company was formerly known as Wanda Commercial Properties (Group) Co., Limited and changed its name to Wanda Hotel Development Company Limited in October 2014. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Wanda Hotel Development Company Limited is a subsidiary of Wanda Commercial Properties Overseas Limited.
